headline: South America Geography
description: South America (17.84 million km²) is the 4th largest continent. Major features: Andes (longest mountain range, 7,000 km), Amazon Basin (largest rainforest), Atacama Desert (driest non-polar place), Angel Falls (tallest waterfall, 979m), Pantanal (largest tropical wetland). 12 countries, ~430 million people.

citation.name: The Physical Geography of South America (Veblen, Young, Orme)
